"- Modified [EmployerDashboard.jsx](file:///g:/Varun/Projects/Job%20Connect/client/src/pages/EmployerDashboard.jsx):

  - Rendered the job post ID badge in the company openings list.
  - Added the `pointer-events-none` class to the background blur circle divs to prevent them from intercepting cursor events and blocking click actions on the "All Organizations" back button.
  - Corrected the `Building2` icon's sizing classes from `md:size-64` (which Tailwind resolves to a massive `w-64 h-64` or 256px size) to `w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16` (48px / 64px) to fit within its parent wrapper properly and prevent it from overlapping the "All Organizations" navigation button.

- Modified [EmployerSettings.jsx](file:///g:/Varun/Projects/Job%20Connect/client/src/pages/EmployerSettings.jsx):
  - Added a static `+` country code prefix label to the Mobile Number settings input field.
  - Strips leading `+` when initializing state on profile load, and automatically prepends `+` to the phone number on profile update submission.
- Modified [CandidateSettings.jsx](file:///g:/Varun/Projects/Job%20Connect/client/src/pages/CandidateSettings.jsx):

<truncated 1416 bytes>
replacement:
"- Modified [EmployerDashboard.jsx](file:///g:/Varun/Projects/Job%20Connect/client/src/pages/EmployerDashboard.jsx):
  - Displayed the job post ID badge next to each active job title.
  - Adjusted top padding of the job card from `pt-6` (via `p-6`) to `pt-8` (`pt-8 px-6 pb-6`) to create clean vertical clearance and resolve the overlapping issue with the absolute-positioned "ACTIVE" status badge.
  - Removed the Email Address display section from the profile quick details summary header and adjusted columns layout to two columns.
  - Added a `getTodayString` helper function to dynamically format today's date as `YYYY-MM-DD` in the local timezone.
  - Set the `min` attribute of the `Expiry Date` date input field to `getTodayString()` to natively prevent selecting any dates in the past.
  - Added frontend validation inside `handlePostJob` to reject job submissions if `expiry_date` is prior to today's date.

- Modified [EmployerDetail.jsx](file:///g:/Varun/Projects/Job%20Connect/client/src/pages/EmployerDetail.jsx):
  - Rendered the job post ID badge in the company openings list.
  - Added the `pointer-events-none` class to the background blur circle divs to prevent them from intercepting cursor events and blocking click actions on the "All Organizations" back button.
  - Corrected the `Building2` icon's sizing classes from `md:size-64` (which Tailwind resolves to a massive `w-64 h-64` or 256px size) to `w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16` (48px / 64px) to fit within its parent wrapper properly and prevent it from overlapping the "All Organizations" navigation button.

- Modified [EmployerSettings.jsx](file:///g:/Varun/Projects/Job%20Connect/client/src/pages/EmployerSettings.jsx):
  - Added a static `+` country code prefix label to the Mobile Number settings input field.
  - Strips leading `+` when initializing state on profile load, and automatically prepends `+` to the phone number on profile update submission.
